seo.description: Nutrition Biologist in the province of Vicenza, with offices in Thiene area in Zanè and Sarcedo. Personalized nutrition plans, sports nutrition and plant-based nutrition. Registered with the Order of Biologists.

hero.name: Greta Pianegonda
hero.tagline: Food education for conscious choices, every day.

about.title: An approach built on food education
about.intro: My name is Greta Pianegonda, Nutrition Biologist based in the province of Vicenza. I look forward to welcoming you to my offices in Zanè (Officina Botanica) and Sarcedo (Snatch Studio), just a few minutes from Thiene. My approach is rooted in nutrition education, a tool that empowers you to make informed and independent choices in your daily life.
about.registry_label: Registered with the Order of Biologists of
about.registry_regions: Veneto · Friuli Venezia Giulia · Trentino Alto Adige

method.listen_desc: Assessment of lifestyle and food preferences.
method.analyze_desc: Anthropometric measurements and energy requirement study.
method.act_desc: A flexible, sustainable plan tailored to your daily rhythms.

services.title: Services

items.plans_desc: Tailored strategies to reach health, wellness and body recomposition goals.
items.sport_desc: Optimize energy during training and improve post-activity recovery.
items.plant_desc: Support for vegetarian and vegan diets with adequate nutrient intake and deficiency prevention.
